meaning: vt.比...更亮,使相形见绌,胜过vi.放光,照耀
examples: Jesse has begun to outshine me in sports.
Such a laser would produce a flash that for an instant could outshine a star.
Try to avoid the mistakes mentioned above so that you outshine as a website designer.
SBC, long a laggard compared with its larger rival Verizon, has recently begun to outshine its competitor.
Interestingly, 2012 started off by giving the dogs of the market a chance to outshine the 2011 winners.
